philosophy.label: Philosophy
philosophy.heading: Style as collaboration
philosophy.p1: A stylist is not the person who says to throw away all your clothes — it is the person who will give a new life to your wardrobe. I truly believe it's a collaboration more than a service, because it requires commitment and trust to get the best results.
philosophy.p2: Longevity over trends. Quality over impulse. Conscious choices that evolve with you.

wardrobe.title: Wardrobe Analysis
wardrobe.desc: You often find yourself staring at a full closet but still feel like you have nothing to wear. We go through every single piece together, determine what works, build outfit formulas, and create a shopping list for the missing essentials. Available offline (at your home, up to 4 hrs) and online (photo or video format).
wardrobe.duration: Up to 4 hrs offline / 10–15 business days online

shopping.title: Personal Shopping Day
shopping.desc: I do pre-shopping to save your time, create a curated list, and accompany you in person. We combine offline and online purchases due to limited stock availability. Note: available after a wardrobe audit.
shopping.duration: Up to 4 hrs (+S$100 per extra hour)

shopping_online.title: Shopping Curation
shopping_online.desc: I select and curate a personalised shopping list tailored to your body type, style, and budget. Includes complete outfit suggestions and 2 weeks of follow-up support as items arrive.

capsule.title: Seasonal Capsule
capsule.desc: Up to 30 pieces that coordinate seamlessly together for a full season. Includes a complete lookbook with all outfit combinations, links, and ordering support. Quality is my priority — durable, stylish pieces.

capsule_travel.title: Travel Capsule
capsule_travel.desc: Up to 15 pieces for a vacation, business trip, or any focused wardrobe need. Everything coordinates together — you'll always have something to wear. Includes outfit combinations and 2 weeks of support.

event.title: Event Styling
event.desc: For any event where you need to look your best — a wedding, public appearance, photoshoot, or formal gathering. We'll have a consultation on budget, style, and preferences. I put together 3 outfit options considering the theme and dress code for you to choose the best one.

1.title: Style Quiz
1.desc: You start by completing a short quiz. It helps me understand your lifestyle, preferences, body type, and goals before we begin.

2.title: Pre-Consultation
2.desc: A 30–45 minute call to connect, align on goals and vision, discuss details, and set a convenient date. We make sure the energy flows well between us.

3.title: The Service
3.desc: The main work: wardrobe audit at your place, shopping day, or capsule creation. I take photos of everything we keep, build outfits, create lookbooks, and handle all the details.

4.title: Report + 2 Weeks Support
4.desc: You receive a personalized file with all recommendations, outfit screenshots, shopping links, and a styling guide. Then you have 2 weeks to ask any questions.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.note: All prices in SGD. Each additional hour billed separately.

wardrobe_audit.title: Wardrobe Audit
wardrobe_audit.desc: Offline (up to 4 hrs, each extra hour +S$100) or online (10–15 business days)

shopping.title: Shopping Assistance
shopping.desc: Personal shopping day offline (up to 4 hrs, +S$100/hr) or online curation (10–15 business days)

travel_capsule.title: Travel Capsule Wardrobe
travel_capsule.desc: Up to 15 items — vacation, business trip, or any focused wardrobe need. 7–10 business days.

seasonal_capsule.title: Seasonal Capsule Wardrobe
seasonal_capsule.desc: Up to 30 items for the full season. 14–20 business days. Complete outfit combinations included.

event.title: Event / Photoshoot Styling
event.desc: 3 outfit options tailored to your event. Price varies by complexity and format.
